message.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete?

auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters with 3 or more of: uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols
auth.accountLocked: Your account is locked. Please contact your administrator to unlock it.
auth.temporaryLock: Your account is temporarily locked due to repeated sign-in failures. Please try again after {unlockAt}.
auth.mfaCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.resetPasswordStep1Hint: Enter your email and recovery code
auth.passwordChangedRedirect: Password changed. Please sign in with your new password.
auth.setupSubtitle: Set your password to activate your account
auth.errorRetry: An error occurred. Please try again later.
auth.mfaRegisterFailed: Failed to register MFA. Please check the code and try again.
auth.recoveryCodeOnce: This code will not be shown again.
auth.mfaSecretManual: If you cannot scan the QR code (manual secret entry)
auth.tokenInvalidContact: Please contact your administrator to resend the invitation email.
auth.setupCompleteHint: Your account is now active. Please save the following recovery codes in a safe place.
auth.mfaSetupHint: System administrators are required to use multi-factor authentication (MFA). Scan the QR code below with an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator) and enter the displayed 6-digit code to activate your account.
auth.mfaSetupNote: Note: You can return to this step from the same link as long as the token is valid (your password is already saved).
